ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cancer_types" (
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer type */,
  "cancer_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cancer type (e.g., 'All Cancer Sites Combined') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cancer type */,
  "cancer_type_code" TEXT /* Unique code or abbreviation for the cancer type */,
  "cancer_type_group" TEXT /* Category or group to which the cancer type belongs */,
  "incidence_rate" REAL /* Average incidence rate of the cancer type across all demographics */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Average mortality rate of the cancer type across all demographics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the cancer type was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the cancer type's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year range */,
  "year_range" TEXT /* Range of years for which data is collected (e.g., '2012-2016') */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the year range */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the year range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the year range was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the year range's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial demographic */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the racial demographic (e.g., 'American Indian/Alaska Native') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the racial demographic */,
  "race_code" TEXT /* Unique code or abbreviation for the racial demographic */,
  "population_estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the racial demographic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the racial demographic was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the racial demographic's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_data" (
  "cancer_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer data entry */,
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer type */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year range */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racial demographic */,
  "age_specific_rate" REAL /* Age-specific rate of cancer for the demographic */,
  "death_count" INTEGER /* Number of deaths due to cancer for the demographic */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the demographic */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for which the data is collected */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the data is collected */,
  "incidence_count" INTEGER /* Number of new cases of cancer */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Survival rate for the demographic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the cancer data entry was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the cancer data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancer_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancer_data_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancer_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancer_data_cancer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cancer_type_id") REFERENCES cancer_types ("cancer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization to which the researcher belongs */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the researcher was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the researcher's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "cancer_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer data being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cancer_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("cancer_data_id") REFERENCES cancer_data ("cancer_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Annual Report, Special Report) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Published) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
